coreQuestion: What had to happen before the user's prompt ever arrived?
stageLearningObjective: Learners should understand that LLM behavior comes from learned weights shaped before ordinary use. Training and fine-tuning can durably change weights; inference later uses those weights. LLMs are not hand-written rulebooks, conscious readers, or magic databases.

cards.title: What Is an LLM?
cards.checkpointRecommendation: Keep the checkpoint target, but pair it with a concrete one-prompt trace so the right answer is not merely vocabulary recall.
cards.notes: Keep concise. Make next-token prediction feel powerful through the visual, not through much more prose.

cards.title: Rationalists vs Empiricists
cards.checkpointRecommendation: Keep the current misconception target, but make it clearly optional/Deep if the shortest path feels abstract.
cards.notes: Useful side-tour. Must avoid implying symbolic systems are obsolete.

cards.title: Training
cards.checkpointRecommendation: Keep. It directly tests durable weight updates versus inference.
cards.notes: Strong essential card. Future polish should emphasize loss and update weights as the durable step.

cards.title: Pretraining
cards.checkpointRecommendation: Keep, but add feedback/visual framing that broad exposure is durable pattern learning, not perfect source recall.
cards.notes: Keep separate from Training. Give the visual a scale-specific role.

cards.title: Overfitting and Generalization
cards.checkpointRecommendation: Keep. It targets a real misconception about memorization versus transferable learning.
cards.notes: Best as Deep path unless the v1 essential path needs an early memorization antidote.

cards.title: Fine-Tuning
cards.checkpointRecommendation: Keep, but add a contrast interaction that separates fine-tuning from prompting, RAG, and sampling.
cards.notes: Most important missing interaction in Before Morning.

cards.title: Alignment
cards.checkpointRecommendation: Keep the checkpoint, and add a misconception check that rejects conscience, truth guarantee, and permanent risk-solving.
cards.notes: Needs same nuance with less text per screen. Use grouped visual callouts rather than longer copy.

stageRecommendations.badgeRecommendation: Keep one badge only: Prompt Life: Model Literate.
redundanciesToRemove: CORE IDEA pill followed by Core idea heading
unneeded path labels inside card summaries
repeated training-loop visuals without a scale distinction

verification.build: passed with existing Vite large-chunk warning
